deals.title: NEW EcoFlow 45W Portable Solar Panel
deals.notes: Item appears to be new in original packaging. Solar panels are foldable design based on visible product images on box. No description provided in listing, which may affect buyer confidence. Popular item for portable power solutions and camping/outdoor use.

deals.title: *BRAND NEW* Creed aventus absolu cologne 75 ml
deals.notes: Sealed/unopened luxury fragrance. Creed Aventus Absolu is a premium discontinued or limited release variant. High resale demand due to brand prestige and scarcity. Verify authenticity carefully as counterfeit Creed fragrances are common in the secondary market.

deals.title: 21 QT. Canner
deals.notes: Black metal pressure canner in functional condition. No visible damage from photo, but no detailed condition description provided in listing. Used for home canning/food preservation. Weight and capacity suggest mid-range residential model. Value depends on complete functionality of pressure valve and seals.

deals.title: Power Tools
deals.notes: Used condition with visible wear. Includes power cord and appears to be complete. Yellow and black DeWalt branding visible. Compact/lightweight circular saw model suitable for general cutting tasks.

deals.title: Coach City Tote Large Brown Signature Canvas Shoulder Bag
deals.notes: Brown signature canvas Coach tote in good condition. Shows visible wear consistent with regular use (creasing, slight discoloration on canvas). No major damage visible, hardware appears intact. The item shows patina typical of pre-owned Coach bags. Missing original listing description limits knowledge of specific details like interior condition, pockets, or presence of care cards/authenticity documentation.

deals.title: Brand new turf for sale 1.5 per sq ft
deals.notes: Price listed at $1.50 per square foot. No brand or specifications provided in listing. Appears to be standard green artificial turf suitable for landscaping. Weight class estimated based on typical turf rolls (70+ lbs depending on square footage). Resale value depends on total square footage available and specific turf specifications (pile height, material composition, UV resistance).

deals.title: Milwaukee Batteries Brand New (Prices Below)
deals.notes: Bulk lot of Milwaukee brand rechargeable batteries in original packaging. Appears to be multiple units of various battery models based on the red packaging visible. Exact model numbers and specifications not clearly identifiable from photos. Condition is new/unopened. Resale value depends on specific voltage and amp-hour ratings of individual batteries.

deals.title: 6 bottle wine cooler. BRAND NEW works great. $60 OBO
deals.notes: Item appears unused and in original packaging. Listing states it 'works great' and is priced at $60 OBO. No visible damage or missing parts. Compact countertop model suitable for small spaces. Market value for similar 6-bottle wine coolers typically ranges $50-$120 depending on brand and features.

deals.title: Brand new black hair salon chair still in box- this is a sample
deals.notes: Listed as sample/display piece still in box. Generic salon chair with chrome base and black padded seat. No visible branding. Typical wholesale salon supply item with limited resale value on secondary markets.

deals.title: Huge Power Tool Lot & Storage Box
deals.item_type: Power Tool Lot with Storage Box
deals.notes: Lot includes circular saw, reciprocating saw, drill/driver, angle grinder, and various accessories. Orange plastic tool box appears to be included. Some tools show visible wear and use. Missing original boxes/packaging. Condition appears well-maintained overall with normal use marks. Resale value dependent on functionality of all powered tools and completeness of accessories.

deals.title: Ridge cut men’s overalls
deals.notes: Appears unworn or minimally worn with original tags attached. Realtree camo pattern. Carhartt is a premium workwear brand with strong resale value. Tag visible on leg indicates new condition.
